message:
fix(fec): use checked_sub to prevent underflow panic in attempt_page_repair

target_pgno - start_pgno could underflow if target_pgno < start_pgno due to
a corrupted or mismatched FEC group metadata entry. Replace bare subtraction
with checked_sub() and return a descriptive FrankenError::internal on underflow
instead of panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
